title: ipomopsis multiflora
intro: Ipomopsis multiflora, also known as skyrocket or scarlet gilia, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cold and flu symptoms, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ipomopsis multiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal plant have not been extensively scientifically studied.
